title: clypeola jonthlaspi proles gracilis
intro: Clypeola jonthlaspi proles gracilis, also known as Lesser cress or Gracilis cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, thanks to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lesser cress include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as soothing digestive issues such as dyspepsia and indigestion. In herbal preparations, Lesser cress can be consumed as a tea, added to soups, or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
